# AGENTS.md — qBittorrent Orphaned

## Project Overview

Find disk files not tracked by any qBittorrent torrent — reclaim storage and clean media libraries.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/qbittorrent-orphaned](https://github.com/GeiserX/qbittorrent-orphaned)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
